title: 13 years without running water
description: EASTERN CAPE NEWS - For two villages in the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - For two villages in the Emalahleni Local Municipality that have been without running water for 13 years, there might be a glimmer of hope.","html":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - For two villages in the Emalahleni Local Municipality that have been without running water for 13 years, there might be a glimmer of hope."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The plight of the villages Boqgo and Qhugqwaru in Vaalbank has been taken up in a letter to the Chris Hani District Municipality (CHDM) and the provincial government requesting urgent intervention."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In a press release on 8 May, DA constituency leader for the north-eastern Cape Marlene Ewers says the Chris Hani District Municipality (CHDM) - the designated water and sanitation service provider for the Emalahleni Municipality - has installed standpipes, but never supplied water, and the standpipes have since been vandalised.","html":"In a press release on 8 May, DA constituency leader for the north-eastern Cape Marlene Ewers says the Chris Hani District Municipality (CHDM) - the designated water and sanitation service provider for the Emalahleni Municipality - has installed standpipes, but never supplied water, and the standpipes have since been vandalised."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I have written to the CHDM Executive Mayor, Lusanda Sizani, and the MEC for Cooperative Governance and Traditional Affairs (Cogta), Zolile Williams, requesting urgent intervention,\" says Ewers.","html":"\"I have written to the CHDM Executive Mayor, Lusanda Sizani, and the MEC for Cooperative Governance and Traditional Affairs (Cogta), Zolile Williams, requesting urgent intervention,\" says Ewers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The Chris Hani District Municipality must also conduct an expedited oversight inspection of the area.\"","html":"\"The Chris Hani District Municipality must also conduct an expedited oversight inspection of the area.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ewers says local DA councillors funded the installation of a borehole in each village in 2021.","html":"Ewers says local DA councillors funded the installation of a borehole in each village in 2021."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite this, villagers still struggle as they must \"pool resources to purchase electricity for the pumps that extract water\".","html":"Despite this, villagers still struggle as they must \"pool resources to purchase electricity for the pumps that extract water\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Access to water is a basic human right, and the failing ANC-led Chris Hani District Municipality's uncaring attitude is denying these villagers, who struggle to put food on the table, this fundamental right enshrined in the South African Constitution,\" says Ewers.","html":"\"Access to water is a basic human right, and the failing ANC-led Chris Hani District Municipality's uncaring attitude is denying these villagers, who struggle to put food on the table, this fundamental right enshrined in the South African Constitution,\" says Ewers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
